10to2 — Official Site

Official website of 10to2, a hyperpop artist blending maximalist electronic production with the hooks and emotion of pop songwriting. Stream the music, shop official merch, and explore an interactive Windows XP-styled desktop.

Music & discography

Listen to releases by 10to2, including Whoareyou?, One2many and Ifwecrash.

  • 10to2 on Spotify
  • 10to2 on Apple Music
  • 10to2 on Instagram

Official merch

Shop official 10to2 merch: the logo tee (sizes S–5XL), wall flag, posters, cassette, CD single and sticker packs. Checkout and worldwide shipping are handled securely on the site.

_
□
X

10to2 is a 19-year-old artist known for his distinctive blending of electronic and pop music. This kind of genre fusion isn't unheard of — in fact it has become a signature of the hyperpop scene, a community of which 10to2 has become deeply embedded in and drawn much of his creative identity from. Hyperpop as a whole thrives on boundary-blurring, taking cues from fast paced, maximalist electronic production and fusing it with the hooks and emotional integrity of pop songwriting. Even within a scene built on genre-blending, 10to2 stands out. Where many hyperpop artists lean into chaos and dissonance, his approach carves out its own lane — a way of merging electronic textures and pop that feels distinct and his own rather than a byproduct of the genre's typical sound. It's this individuality, layered on top of an already unconventional sound, that's helped him carve out a name for himself at just 19.

This site requires a display of at least 800 × 600 and a mouse.

It's a whole Windows XP desktop. It does not fit in your hand, and pretending otherwise would make it worse for both of us.
